title: Smoky Swede Wraps
description: A delicious and easy-to-make wrap filled with roasted swede, crunchy slaw, and a hint of smoky flavor.
instructions: 2. Peel and chop the swede into 1-inch cubes.
3. Toss the swede with a drizzle of olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
4. Roast the swede in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
5. Meanwhile, prepare the crunchy slaw according to package instructions.
6. Warm the wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
7. Assemble the wraps by spreading a layer of mayonnaise or lime juice on each wrap, if using.
8. Fill each wrap with roasted swede, crunchy slaw, and any additional desired toppings.
10. Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 24 hours.
